title: Follow-up Letter
subtitle: A simple Jinja-driven letter layout for polished PDF output.
subject: Clinic follow-up and treatment plan
paragraphs: Thank you for reviewing our shared patient. I am writing to summarise the current treatment plan and the most relevant follow-up points from the neurology visit.
Overall stability has improved since the previous review. There have been no prolonged breakthrough episodes, and adherence strategies are now in place.
Please let me know if there is any interval deterioration, especially new focal deficits, prolonged seizure activity, or clear medication intolerance.
bullets: Continue current antiseizure medication without abrupt interruption
Escalate promptly if seizure frequency increases
Review again in 6 to 8 weeks or sooner if red flags emerge
